title: Kofi and the Safari Friends
synopsis: Little Kofi meets friendly safari animals during a magical day in the savanna, learning simple animal sounds and names.

pages.text: Kofi walks in the warm grass. The sun shines bright.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden savanna grass under a warm orange sunset, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: A big elephant says hello. Trumpet! Trumpet!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes standing next to a large friendly elephant, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors and textured painterly style

pages.text: A tall giraffe reaches high. Kofi waves up, up, up!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes waving up at a very tall giraffe with golden grass around them, painted with expressive gouache brushstrokes and warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kofi waving at a tall giraffe

pages.text: Lion roars loud. ROAR! Kofi giggles and claps.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes clapping while a friendly lion with a golden mane roars, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes and bold confident strokes in an orange sunset
illustration.alt: Kofi clapping as a lion roars

pages.text: Zebra has stripes. Black and white, black and white!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes looking at a zebra with bold black and white stripes, painted in textured painterly gouache style with warm savanna colors in the background

pages.text: All the animals are friends. Kofi loves safari time!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes surrounded by all the safari animals - elephant, giraffe, lion, and zebra - in golden grass under an orange sunset, painted with expressive animals and thick gouache brushstrokes
illustration.alt: Kofi with all his safari animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
questions.explanation: Elephants make a trumpet sound with their trunks!

questions.question: What colors are the zebra's stripes?
questions.explanation: Zebras have black and white stripes!

questions.question: Which animal is very tall?
questions.explanation: Giraffes are the tallest animals and can reach very high!
